payload.issue_title: ImportError loading Stripe connector dynamic module
payload.issue_description:
The checkout page fails to process stripe transactions and test cases fail with an import error. The Stripe module fails to dynamically bind. Stack trace:

```python
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test_payment.py", line 22, in test_stripe_import_loading
    assert payment_processor.stripe is not None
AssertionError: assert None is not None
```

Note: The dynamic import loads `stripe_gateway` but the local file is actually named `stripe_client.py`.

rca_report.stack_trace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test_payment.py", line 22, in test_stripe_import_loading
    assert payment_processor.stripe is not None
AssertionError: assert None is not None

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test_payment.py", line 22, in test_stripe_import_loading
    assert payment_processor.stripe is not None
AssertionError: assert None is not None

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test_payment.py", line 22, in test_stripe_import_loading
    assert payment_processor.stripe is not None
AssertionError: assert None is not None

similar_fixes.title: ImportError in dynamic stripe connector
similar_fixes.root_cause: Stripe SDK name mismatch when importing dynamically in stripe_client.py
similar_fixes.patch_summary: Catch ImportError and fallback to stripe mock or correct string import name

rca_report.stack_trace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "test_payment.py", line 22, in test_stripe_import_loading
    assert payment_processor.stripe is not None
AssertionError: assert None is not None

similar_fixes.title: ImportError in dynamic stripe connector
similar_fixes.root_cause: Stripe SDK name mismatch when importing dynamically in stripe_client.py
similar_fixes.patch_summary: Catch ImportError and fallback to stripe mock or correct string import name

hypotheses.description: Stripe module failed to import in payment_processor.py because the library name is misspelled or loaded incorrectly
hypotheses.reasoning: The issue reports 'ImportError: No module named stripe_gateway'. In payment_processor.py, there is a dynamic import for stripe_gateway which fails if the library or helper filename does not match exactly.

hypotheses.description: Missing system-level python dependencies inside environment
hypotheses.reasoning: The Stripe dependency is not installed in the environment pip manifest, causing standard imports to fail.

rca_report.origin_issue: ImportError loading Stripe connector dynamic module
rca_report.selected_hypothesis: Stripe module failed to import in payment_processor.py because the library name is misspelled or loaded incorrectly
evidence: payment_processor.py attempts dynamic import of stripe_gateway
Repository contains stripe_client.py helper instead
No stripe_gateway.py exists in active modules paths

0/1 Passed
